title: Daybreak
writer: Arthur Schnitzler, Cyril Hume, Ruth Cummings
actors: Ramon Novarro, Helen Chandler, Jean Hersholt
plot: Willi, a brash young lieutenant in the Austrian Imperial Guard, bent on an evening of pleasure, visits a gambling parlor and house of ill-repute. He meets Laura, a sweet innocent girl and spends the night with her, leaving her mon...
